response.justification: The candidate demonstrates strong software development skills and a diverse technical background, but lacks direct experience with the mandatory C++/Windows and fixed-income/capital-markets domain expertise required for this role. Their recent work focuses heavily on TypeScript, Node.js, and web technologies, which are not aligned with the core requirements.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience with modern technologies and best practices (TDD, CI/CD, pair programming).
Strong communication skills and leadership demonstrated through workshops, talks, and open-source contributions.
Diverse technical background with exposure to low-latency systems, real-time data processing, and high-performance applications.
concerns: No explicit C++ development experience on Windows in the last 5+ years, a mandatory requirement.
No demonstrated experience in capital markets, investment banking, or fixed-income domains.
Recent roles emphasize TypeScript/Node.js and web technologies, diverging from the C++/SQL Server focus of the role.
